results.title: Jon Stewart Unloads On Trump Storming Out Of ‘Meet The Press’ Interview: “Hissy Fit Of An Incredibly Fragile Man-Baby”
results.description: Before attending Game 3 of the NBA Finals, between the New York Knicks and San Antonio Spurs, Monday night Daily Show host Jon Stewart noted that the “excitement in New York is palpable” and that “almost everyone” is rooting for the city’s team. The political comic kicked off the episode by addressing the internet furor ...

results.title: Union Area rallies, shocks Berlin Brothersvalley in PIAA 1A semifinal
results.description: ' If we could have pulled out a win, it would have been great. Making school history is something we're good at doing.'
